name: turbalance-analytics-mobile
description: Native iPhone and Android app for the turbalance Analytics dashboard.

scripts.add:ios: npm run sync && cap add ios
scripts.add:android: npm run sync && cap add android
scripts.build:ios:simulator: xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.open:android: npm run sync:native && cap open android
